description: Resource type definition for AWS User Notifications ManagedNotificationConfiguration. This is a read-only resource representing AWS-managed notification configurations.

Arn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the ManagedNotificationConfiguration.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:[-.a-z0-9]{1,63}:notifications::[0-9]{12}:managed-notification-configuration/category/[a-zA-Z0-9\-]{3,64}/sub-category/[a-zA-Z0-9\-]{3,64}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the ManagedNotificationConfiguration.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 64  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9\-]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Description.markdownDescription:
The description of the ManagedNotificationConfiguration.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Pattern: ^[^\u0001-\u001F\u007F-\u009F]*$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Category.markdownDescription:
The category of the ManagedNotificationConfiguration.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: Replacement

SubCategory.markdownDescription:
The subCategory of the ManagedNotificationConfiguration.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: Replacement
